memoryArtifacts.headline: Had part in Conquest of England
memoryArtifacts.description: REMARKS: He with his sons Guarine and Rainaldus came to the Conquest of England. (J-Morris, Shropshire Genealogies, vol. 7 p. 3613)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Ancitel de Bayeux於0972年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也時，他的父親Balso de Bayeux42歲，母親Judith de Boulogne38歲。他和Poppa de Senlis至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1031年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bayeux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Landry, Alphonse, Andre, Armand, Colette, Monique, Theophile.
French (northern): from an old form of   Mayeur  . Compare   Mayeaux  .

variants.name: Mayeaux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Clemile, Ferrel.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Ancitel de Bayeux was born in 0972, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Balso de Bayeux, was 42 and his mother, Judith de Boulogne, was 38. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Poppa de Senlis. He died in 1031, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Ancitel de Bayeux est né en 0972, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Balso de Bayeux, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Judith de Boulogne, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Poppa de Senlis. Il est décédé en 1031, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Ancitel de Bayeux 0972 in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Balso de Bayeux 42 und seine Mutter Judith de Boulogne 38. Er hatte mit Poppa de Senlis mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1031 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Ancitel de Bayeux è nato il nel 0972 nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Balso de Bayeux, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Boulogne, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Poppa de Senlis. Morì nel 1031, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Count Ancitel de Bayeux(이)가 0972년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Balso de Bayeux(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Boulogne(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Poppa de Senlis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1031년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Ancitel de Bayeux nasceu em 0972, em Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Balso de Bayeux, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Boulogne, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Poppa de Senlis. Ele faleceu em 1031, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Ancitel de Bayeux родился в 0972 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Balso de Bayeux было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Judith de Boulogne, 38. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Poppa de Senlis. Он умер в 1031 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Poppa de Senlis. Murió en 1031, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
